final:
module four_bit_counter (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [3:0] out
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        out <= 4'b0000;
    end else begin
        out <= out + 1;
    end
end

endmodule
